sizing_rule.note: Leverage multiplier q derived from Sharpe-like ratio: q = (E - RFR) / V. Maps to optimal f framework. Parameters E, RFR, and V must be supplied at runtime; no fixed percentage given in source.

source_rule_text: Calculate optimal leverage multiplier (q) for a constrained tangent portfolio using the ratio of excess return to variance, adjusted for risk-free rate.
